name: VIVOSUN AeroLab THB1 Wireless Bluetooth Hygrometer Thermometer, Smart Temperature Monitor, VPD, Digital Humidity Meter, LCD Remote Control, Data Storage, Dual Channels
notes: Standalone Bluetooth hygrometer/thermometer that pairs as a wireless sensor node with GrowHub E42/E42A/E25; up to 6 units can be paired per controller; acts as WiFi gateway when connected to GrowHub
